_description: Expected JSON payloads for startup invitation inbox APIs. FE should use these shapes as the source of truth until the backend is live.

endpoints.notes: Returns role, commitment, and equity controls for assigning someone before sending an invite.
Request body for sending an outgoing startup invitation with assignment details.
Returns incoming startup invitations for the authenticated user.
Request body for accepting or denying an invitation.
200 success example when the decision is accept.
200 success example when the decision is deny.
